html:
Daily Economic Briefing

Friday, 24 July 2026

Housing 10:00 ETFed 13:00 / 16:15
Liquidity & Stress Metrics - The Gnosis Pulse
MOVE is Treasury volatility and term-premium stress; SOFR is secured overnight funding; NFCI is broad financial conditions, with negative values looser and positive values tighter. No fresh date-specific values were verified in the required primary calendar check.
Gnosis Interpretation
Housing data is the only scheduled market-sensitive release verified for today. Fed statistical releases provide the funding and banking backdrop; the next EIA petroleum report is Wednesday, 29 July.
Economic Calendar: 2026-07-24
Primary-source conflict check passed. Census, Federal Reserve, BLS, BEA, EIA, TreasuryDirect, and NYSE date-specific calendars were checked. No Investing.com, market-calendar aggregator, Google Drive, or Google Docs source was used.
EventETSource / notes
New Residential Sales, June 202610:00U.S. Census Bureau; date and time verified.
Commercial Paper13:00Federal Reserve statistical release.
H.15 Selected Interest Rates16:15Federal Reserve statistical release.
H.8 Assets and Liabilities of Commercial Banks16:15Federal Reserve statistical release.
Omissions and Watch
BLS and BEA have no verified release on 24 July. EIA's next Weekly Petroleum Status Report is 29 July at the standard Wednesday release time. TreasuryDirect did not provide a date-specific auction entry for 24 July, and NYSE lists no holiday or shortened session. Geopolitical and policy developments remain headline risk but no date-specific official event was verified.
Trading Strategy Note (ES Futures)
Base case: Treat 10:00 ET housing as the principal scheduled impulse, then monitor the Fed's afternoon rates and banking releases for liquidity confirmation.
Invalidation: Avoid forcing a macro narrative when no inflation, labor, GDP, energy, auction, or Fed policy event is scheduled. Reassess only on verified headline or rates-flow changes.
